urdu transliteration text: ASHK AANKHOn MEn HAI MAATAM HAI BAPAA EHLE AZAA
english translation text: Eyes are tearful, lamentation has come to pass, O mourners

urdu transliteration text: MAJLIS-E GHAM MEn KAREn AAIYE MILKAR YE DUAA
english translation text: Let us pray in this majlis of morning

urdu transliteration text: BHAAI ZINDAA RAHE BEHNOn KE BAHAQQE ZEHRAA
english translation text: Long may brothers live for their sisters for the sake of Zahra s.a

urdu transliteration text: TAA QAYAAMAT RAHE MAAn BEHNOn KAA QAAYAM PARDAA
english translation text: May the modesty of our womenfolk remain safeguarded forever

urdu transliteration text: SHAANE USS BHAAI KE ALLAAH SALAAMAT RAKHKHEJO BANAA-E GAYE BEHNOn KI HIFAAZAT KE LIYE
english translation text:
May the arms of those brothers stay strong
Who were created to protect their sisters

urdu transliteration text: SHABBIR DUAA KARTE THE ROKAR TAHE KHANJAR
english translation text: Shabbir (a.s) cried in supplication under the dagger

urdu transliteration text: SAR MERAA KATE GHAM NAHIn LIT JAAYE BHARAA GAR
english translation text: My head be severed and my home ransacked, I do not fear

urdu transliteration text:
REH-JAAE MERI ZAINABE DILGIR KAA PARDAA
If only my broken hearted Zainab's veil is spared
HAMSHIR KAA PARDAA MERI DILGIR KA PARDAA
english translation text: The veil of my sister, the veil of the heartbroken
